name: Chocolate Greeting Card Cake
recipeInstructions: Heat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 13x9x2-inch baking pan. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda, and salt. Add the butter, sour cream, eggs, and vanilla; beat on medium speed of an electric mixer for 3 minutes. Pour the batter into the prepared pan. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool for 10 minutes before removing from the pan to a wire rack. Allow the cake to cool completely. Transfer the cake to a serving plate. Frost with one-bowl buttercream frosting. Decorate the cake to resemble a greeting card. Makes about 12 to 15 servings.
